# tokens-bruecke

> Figma plugin + CLI that exports Figma variables and styles as DTCG 2025.10 design tokens JSON. The CLI (`npx tokens-bruecke`) fetches variables via the Figma REST API (requires a Figma Enterprise plan) and writes tokens to a file or stdout.

Quick CLI usage:
`npx tokens-bruecke --api-key "$FIGMA_TOKEN" --file-key <FILE_KEY> --output tokens.json`
or pipe-friendly: `npx tokens-bruecke -a "$FIGMA_TOKEN" -f <FILE_KEY> --stdout --quiet`

## Docs

- [Agent skill: CLI usage guide](skills/tokens-bruecke/SKILL.md): flags, auth, config, output layout, exit codes
- [README — Use as CLI tool](README.md#use-as-cli-tool): human-oriented CLI documentation
- [Config file JSON schema](schemas/cli-options.schema.json): all config options with types, enums, and defaults
- [Example config file](examples/cli-options.json): ready-to-copy --config file

## Optional

- [README — full plugin documentation](README.md): Figma plugin UI, push-to-server (GitHub/GitLab/JSONBin), styles support, tokens structure
- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md): release history
